TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: ti sa Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan tsug a marivu katua va…´aw.
S.PHON: ti sa pu éa éuja éujan ¶ug a marivu katua va éaw.
S.FORM: ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan cug a marivu katua valjaw.
S.PHON: ti sa pu éa éuja éujan ¶ug a maRivu katua va éaw.
S.TRANSL: Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan liked to quarrel with his wife.

S.FORM: nu keman ini pakani, marka ve…´atjen.
S.PHON: nu k…ôman ini pakani, marka v…ô éac…ôn.
S.FORM: nu keman ini pakani, marka veljatjen.
S.PHON: nu k…ôman ini pakani, maRka v…ô éa ¶…ôn.
S.TRANSL: When they ate he didn‚Äôt give her food, but they hit one another(?).

S.FORM: qau limutseng azua va…´aw; vaik a …´etaladj tua verung nua tsuqu.
S.PHON: qau …≠imu ¶…ô≈ã azua va éaw; vaik a é…ôta…≠a…â tua v…ôru≈ã nua ¶uqu.
S.FORM: qau limuceng azua valjaw; vaik a ljetaladj tua verung nua cuqu.
S.PHON: qau …£imu ¶…ô≈ã azua va éaw; vaik a é…ôta…£a…â tua v…ôRu≈ã nua ¶uqu.
S.TRANSL: His wife was angry, and went into a hole in a bischoffia tree.

S.FORM: qau tsuatsuay anga malap ti sa Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan tua putjaw, sa putjavi a tsuqu, a muri pa…´ekatsauan tua va…´aw.
S.PHON: qau ¶ua ¶uaj a≈ãa ma…≠ap ti sa pu éa éuja éujan tua pucaw, sa pucavi a ¶uqu, a muri pa é…ôka ¶auan tua va éaw.
S.FORM: qau cuacuay anga malap ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan tua putjaw, sa putjavi a cuqu, a muri paljekacauan tua valjaw.
S.PHON: qau ¶ua ¶uaj a≈ãa ma…£ap ti sa pu éa éuja éujan tua pu ¶aw, sa pu ¶avi a ¶uqu, a muRi pa é…ôka ¶auan tua va éaw.
S.TRANSL: After a time Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan took an axe and chopped at the tree to get his wife out.

S.FORM: manu "teng," aya, milayap a sema tjai likuz tua …´avek.
S.PHON: manu "t…ô≈ã," aja, mi…≠ajap a s…ôma cai …≠ikuz tua éav…ôk.
S.FORM: manu "teng," aya, milayap a sema tjai likuz tua ljavek.
S.PHON: manu "t…ô≈ã," aja, mi…£ajap a s…ôma ¶ai …£ikuz tua éav…ôk.
S.TRANSL: But it (or she) said ‚ÄúTung,‚Äù and she flew to the far side of the sea.

S.FORM: tsuatsuay anga mapuvarung ti sa Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan.
S.PHON: ¶ua ¶uaj a≈ãa mapuvaru≈ã ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.FORM: cuacuay anga mapuvarung ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: ¶ua ¶uaj a≈ãa mapuvaRu≈ã ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.TRANSL: After a time Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan got anxious.

S.FORM: qemaqivu tua sikataqa…´an tu vaik a qema…´up.
S.PHON: q…ômaqivu tua sikataqa éan tu vaik a q…ôma éup.
S.FORM: qemaqivu tua sikataqaljan tu vaik a qemaljup.
S.PHON: q…ômaqivu tua sikataqa éan tu vaik a q…ôma éup.
S.TRANSL: He called his fellow-villagers to go hunting.

S.FORM: qau ki…´avaran ti sa Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan: "tiaken makamaza ken i dungdung tua …´avek.
S.PHON: qau ki éavaran ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "tiak…ôn makamaza k…ôn i du≈ãdu≈ã tua éav…ôk.
S.FORM: qau kiljavaran ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan: "tiaken makamaza ken i dungdung tua ljavek.
S.PHON: qau ki éavaRan ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "tiak…ôn makamaza k…ôn i du≈ãdu≈ã tua éav…ôk.
S.TRANSL: So Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan said: ‚ÄúI‚Äôll go along here near the sea.

S.FORM: timun pakazua-u itjua pungayan."
S.PHON: timun pakazua-u icua pu≈ãajan."
S.FORM: timun pakazua-u itjua pungayan."
S.PHON: timun pakazua-u i ¶ua pu≈ãajan."
S.TRANSL: You go along by the cliffs.‚Äù

S.FORM: manu neka nu satsemel.
S.PHON: manu n…ôka nu sa ¶…ôm…ô…≠.
S.FORM: manu neka nu sacemel.
S.PHON: manu n…ôka nu sa ¶…ôm…ô…£.
S.TRANSL: There was no wild game.

S.FORM: nu paluku, qatjuvi marka nga·∏çi sakamaya.
S.PHON: nu pa…≠uku, qacuvi marka ≈ãa…ñi sakamaja.
S.FORM: nu paluku, qatjuvi marka ngadri sakamaya.
S.PHON: nu pa…£uku, qa ¶uvi maRka ≈ãa…ñi sakamaja.
S.TRANSL: If they started anything, it was just snakes and badgers.

S.FORM: qau kirivu a sikataqa…´an.
S.PHON: qau kirivu a sikataqa éan.
S.FORM: qau kirivu a sikataqaljan.
S.PHON: qau kiRivu a sikataqa éan.
S.TRANSL: The villagers complained:

S.FORM: "aku neka nu satsemel?" aya kivadaq tjai sa Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan.
S.PHON: "aku n…ôka nu sa ¶…ôm…ô…≠" aja kivadaq cai sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.FORM: "aku neka nu sacemel?" aya kivadaq tjai sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: "aku n…ôka nu sa ¶…ôm…ô…£" aja kivadaq ¶ai sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWhy is there no game?‚Äù they asked Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan.

S.FORM: qau ki…´avaran ti sa Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan: "nuka qatjuvi, nuka nga·∏çi kuangu," aya ki…´avaran.
S.PHON: qau ki éavaran ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "nuka qacuvi, nuka ≈ãa…ñi kua≈ãu," aja ki éavaran.
S.FORM: qau kiljavaran ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan: "nuka qatjuvi, nuka ngadri kuangu," aya kiljavaran.
S.PHON: qau ki éavaRan ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "nuka qa ¶uvi, nuka ≈ãa…ñi kua≈ãu," aja ki éavaRan.
S.TRANSL: He replied: ‚ÄúShoot even snakes and badgers,‚Äù he said.

S.FORM: qau timadju izua i …´avek a qarawqawqaw sakamaya.
S.PHON: qau tima…âu izua i éav…ôk a qarawqawqaw sakamaja.
S.FORM: qau timadju izua i ljavek a qarawqawqaw sakamaya.
S.PHON: qau tima…âu izua i éav…ôk a qaRawqawqaw sakamaja.
S.TRANSL: And he was there by the sea shouting away.

S.FORM: qau a sikataqa…´an: "anema kudakudain nazua tsautsau?" aya kinemnem.
S.PHON: qau a sikataqa éan: "an…ôma kudakudain nazua ¶au ¶au" aja kin…ômn…ôm.
S.FORM: qau a sikataqaljan: "anema kudakudain nazua caucau?" aya kinemnem.
S.PHON: qau a sikataqa éan: "an…ôma kudakudain nazua ¶au ¶au" aja kin…ômn…ôm.
S.TRANSL: The villagers thought: ‚ÄúWhat‚Äôs this fellow up to?‚Äù

S.FORM: qau vaiken a kiqenetj.
S.PHON: qau vaik…ôn a kiq…ôn…ôc.
S.FORM: qau vaiken a kiqenetj.
S.PHON: qau vaik…ôn a kiq…ôn…ô ¶.
S.TRANSL: They went to have a look.

S.FORM: mintu "…´au…´au…´avu a djara…´ap," ayaya semenasenay.
S.PHON: mintu " éau éau éavu a …âara éap," ajaja s…ôm…ônas…ônaj.
S.FORM: mintu "ljauljauljavu a djaraljap," ayaya semenasenay.
S.PHON: mintu " éau éau éavu a …âaRa éap," ajaja s…ôm…ônas…ônaj.
S.TRANSL: And he was singing: ‚ÄúStretch out, banyan tree!‚Äù.

S.FORM: qau tsuay anga …´emau…´au a djara…´ap a sema tjai likuz tua …´avek.
S.PHON: qau ¶uaj a≈ãa é…ômau éau a …âara éap a s…ôma cai …≠ikuz tua éav…ôk.
S.FORM: qau cuay anga ljemauljau a djaraljap a sema tjai likuz tua ljavek.
S.PHON: qau ¶uaj a≈ãa é…ômau éau a …âaRa éap a s…ôma ¶ai …£ikuz tua éav…ôk.
S.TRANSL: After a time the tree stretched out to the far side of the sea.

S.FORM: qau azua ti sa Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan semusu a vaik tua djara…´ap.
S.PHON: qau azua ti sa pu éa éuja éujan s…ômusu a vaik tua …âara éap.
S.FORM: qau azua ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan semusu a vaik tua djaraljap.
S.PHON: qau azua ti sa pu éa éuja éujan s…ômusu a vaik tua …âaRa éap.
S.TRANSL: And Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan went along the tree.

S.FORM: mintu tsaluman tua qina…´ivan nua tapaw nua va…´aw.
S.PHON: mintu ¶a…≠uman tua qina éivan nua tapaw nua va éaw.
S.FORM: mintu caluman tua qinaljivan nua tapaw nua valjaw.
S.PHON: mintu ¶a…£uman tua qina éivan nua tapaw nua va éaw.
S.TRANSL: He reached the roof of his wife‚Äôs house,

S.FORM: qau sualapen a itung, sa vu…´uqan a pa…´eteku.
S.PHON: qau sua…≠ap…ôn a itu≈ã, sa vu éuqan a pa é…ôt…ôku.
S.FORM: qau sualapen a itung, sa vuljuqan a paljeteku.
S.PHON: qau sua…£ap…ôn a itu≈ã, sa vu éuqan a pa é…ôt…ôku.
S.TRANSL: and took off his clothes and threw them down below.

S.FORM: manu djumaken nua a…´ak nua va…´aw.
S.PHON: manu …âumak…ôn nua a éak nua va éaw.
S.FORM: manu djumaken nua aljak nua valjaw.
S.PHON: manu …âumak…ôn nua a éak nua va éaw.
S.TRANSL: His wife‚Äôs child found them.

S.FORM: "aku uzaitsu a itung, kina?
S.PHON: "aku uzai ¶u a itu≈ã, kina
S.FORM: "aku uzaicu a itung, kina?
S.PHON: "aku uzai ¶u a itu≈ã, kina
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWhy are these clothes here, mother?

S.FORM: matu su inalangan."
S.PHON: matu su ina…≠a≈ãan."
S.FORM: matu su inalangan."
S.PHON: matu su ina…£a≈ãan."
S.TRANSL: They look like ones made by you.‚Äù

S.FORM: "maka inu ti tjama tua …´avek?"
S.PHON: "maka inu ti cama tua éav…ôk"
S.FORM: "maka inu ti tjama tua ljavek?"
S.PHON: "maka inu ti ¶ama tua éav…ôk"
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúHow did your father get here across the sea?‚Äù

S.FORM: qau sualapen ni sa Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan a dangi…´an, sa vu…´uqan uta.
S.PHON: qau sua…≠ap…ôn ni sa pu éa éuja éujan a da≈ãi éan, sa vu éuqan uta.
S.FORM: qau sualapen ni sa Puljaljuyaljuyan a dangiljan, sa vuljuqan uta.
S.PHON: qau sua…£ap…ôn ni sa pu éa éuja éujan a da≈ãi éan, sa vu éuqan uta.
S.TRANSL: Then Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan took off his apron (loincloth?) and threw that down too.

S.FORM: qau djumaken nua kake·∏çian
S.PHON: qau …âumak…ôn nua kak…ô…ñian
S.FORM: qau djumaken nua kakedrian
S.PHON: qau …âumak…ôn nua kak…ô…ñian
S.TRANSL: The child found it.

S.FORM: "aku uzaitsu a dangi…´an?
S.PHON: "aku uzai ¶u a da≈ãi éan
S.FORM: "aku uzaicu a dangiljan?
S.PHON: "aku uzai ¶u a da≈ãi éan
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWhy is this apron here?

S.FORM: matu su inalangan."
S.PHON: matu su ina…≠a≈ãan."
S.FORM: matu su inalangan."
S.PHON: matu su ina…£a≈ãan."
S.TRANSL: It looks like one made by you.‚Äù

S.FORM: qau …´etsasaw a kina, sa kiqenetji a pasa qina…´ivan.
S.PHON: qau é…ô ¶asaw a kina, sa kiq…ôn…ôci a pasa qina éivan.
S.FORM: qau ljecasaw a kina, sa kiqenetji a pasa qinaljivan.
S.PHON: qau é…ô ¶asaw a kina, sa kiq…ôn…ô ¶i a pasa qina éivan.
S.TRANSL: The mother went out, and looked up at the roof.

S.FORM: mintu djemelidjeli ti sa Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan i vavaw tua qina…´ivan.
S.PHON: mintu …â…ôm…ô…≠i…â…ô…≠i ti sa pu éa éuja éujan i vavaw tua qina éivan.
S.FORM: mintu djemelidjeli ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan i vavaw tua qinaljivan.
S.PHON: mintu …â…ôm…ô…£i…â…ô…£i ti sa pu éa éuja éujan i vavaw tua qina éivan.
S.TRANSL: There was Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan laughing on the roof.

S.FORM: qaqivuin anga nua va…´aw a pasa qumaqan.
S.PHON: qaqivuin a≈ãa nua va éaw a pasa qumaqan.
S.FORM: qaqivuin anga nua valjaw a pasa qumaqan.
S.PHON: qaqivuin a≈ãa nua va éaw a pasa qumaqan.
S.TRANSL: His wife called to him to come indoors.

S.FORM: qau maseleman anga, keman tua kaiven.
S.PHON: qau mas…ô…≠…ôman a≈ãa, k…ôman tua kaiv…ôn.
S.FORM: qau maseleman anga, keman tua kaiven.
S.PHON: qau mas…ô…£…ôman a≈ãa, k…ôman tua kaiv…ôn.
S.TRANSL: After dark they sat down to supper.

S.FORM: manu ini kan ti sa Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan.
S.PHON: manu ini kan ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.FORM: manu ini kan ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: manu ini kan ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.TRANSL: Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan didn‚Äôt eat.

S.FORM: qau kivadaqan nua va…´aw: "anema su tjenglayan a keman?" ayain.
S.PHON: qau kivadaqan nua va éaw: "an…ôma su c…ô≈ã…≠ajan a k…ôman" ajain.
S.FORM: qau kivadaqan nua valjaw: "anema su tjenglayan a keman?" ayain.
S.PHON: qau kivadaqan nua va éaw: "an…ôma su ¶…ô≈ã…£ajan a k…ôman" ajain.
S.TRANSL: His wife asked him: ‚ÄúWhat would you like to eat?‚Äù

S.FORM: "avan a va…´etjuk sakamaya a tjenglayan a keman."
S.PHON: "avan a va é…ôcuk sakamaja a c…ô≈ã…≠ajan a k…ôman."
S.FORM: "avan a valjetjuk sakamaya a tjenglayan a keman."
S.PHON: "avan a va é…ô ¶uk sakamaja a ¶…ô≈ã…£ajan a k…ôman."
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúI would just like to eat an orange (or oranges).‚Äù

S.FORM: qau siyaya tua va…´etjuk sa pakani.
S.PHON: qau sijaja tua va é…ôcuk sa pakani.
S.FORM: qau siyaya tua valjetjuk sa pakani.
S.PHON: qau sijaja tua va é…ô ¶uk sa pakani.
S.TRANSL: So she picked an orange for him and gave it to him to eat.

S.FORM: qau muri qemereng anga.
S.PHON: qau muri q…ôm…ôr…ô≈ã a≈ãa.
S.FORM: qau muri qemereng anga.
S.PHON: qau muRi q…ôm…ôR…ô≈ã a≈ãa.
S.TRANSL: When they were going to lie down,

S.FORM: ki…´avaran ti sa Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan: "qemereng aken i kulakula," aya ki…´avaran tua va…´aw.
S.PHON: ki éavaran ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "q…ôm…ôr…ô≈ã ak…ôn i ku…≠aku…≠a," aja ki éavaran tua va éaw.
S.FORM: kiljavaran ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan: "qemereng aken i kulakula," aya kiljavaran tua valjaw.
S.PHON: ki éavaRan ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "q…ôm…ôR…ô≈ã ak…ôn i ku…£aku…£a," aja ki éavaRan tua va éaw.
S.TRANSL: Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan said: ‚ÄúI‚Äôll lie at the foot end,‚Äù he said to his wife.

S.FORM: a va…´aw: "maya qemereng i kulakula; makulakula sun."
S.PHON: a va éaw: "maja q…ôm…ôr…ô≈ã i ku…≠aku…≠a; maku…≠aku…≠a sun."
S.FORM: a valjaw: "maya qemereng i kulakula; makulakula sun."
S.PHON: a va éaw: "maja q…ôm…ôR…ô≈ã i ku…£aku…£a; maku…£aku…£a sun."
S.TRANSL: His wife said: ‚ÄúDon‚Äôt lie at the foot end; you‚Äôll have trouble with the feet.‚Äù

S.FORM: "qemereng aken i …´aving," aya ti sa Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan.
S.PHON: "q…ôm…ôr…ô≈ã ak…ôn i éavi≈ã," aja ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.FORM: "qemereng aken i ljaving," aya ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: "q…ôm…ôR…ô≈ã ak…ôn i éavi≈ã," aja ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúI‚Äôll lie at the edge,‚Äù said Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan.

S.FORM: ki…´avaran a va…´aw: "maya qemereng i …´avi…´aving; ma…´avi…´aving sun.
S.PHON: ki éavaran a va éaw: "maja q…ôm…ôr…ô≈ã i éavi éavi≈ã; ma éavi éavi≈ã sun.
S.FORM: kiljavaran a valjaw: "maya qemereng i ljaviljaving; maljaviljaving sun.
S.PHON: ki éavaRan a va éaw: "maja q…ôm…ôR…ô≈ã i éavi éavi≈ã; ma éavi éavi≈ã sun.
S.TRANSL: His wife said: ‚ÄúDon‚Äôt lie at the side; you‚Äôll have trouble at the edge.

S.FORM: qerengu izua itjua qeluz," aya a va…´aw.
S.PHON: q…ôr…ô≈ãu izua icua q…ô…≠uz," aja a va éaw.
S.FORM: qerengu izua itjua qeluz," aya a valjaw.
S.PHON: q…ôR…ô≈ãu izua i ¶ua q…ô…£uz," aja a va éaw.
S.TRANSL: Lie there by the pillar,‚Äù said his wife.

S.FORM: qau vaik a qemereng sema tjua qeluz ti sa Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan.
S.PHON: qau vaik a q…ôm…ôr…ô≈ã s…ôma cua q…ô…≠uz ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.FORM: qau vaik a qemereng sema tjua qeluz ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: qau vaik a q…ôm…ôR…ô≈ã s…ôma ¶ua q…ô…£uz ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.TRANSL: So Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan went to lie by the pillar.

S.FORM: ita vengin inika taqed, qaritjqitjqitj.
S.PHON: ita v…ô≈ãin inika taq…ôd, qaricqicqic.
S.FORM: ita vengin inika taqed, qaritjqitjqitj.
S.PHON: ita v…ô≈ãin inika taq…ôd, qaRi ¶qi ¶qi ¶.
S.TRANSL: The whole night he didn‚Äôt sleep; he was just grinding his teeth.

S.FORM: kivadaqan nua va…´aw ti sa Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan: "makuda sun?
S.PHON: kivadaqan nua va éaw ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "makuda sun
S.FORM: kivadaqan nua valjaw ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan: "makuda sun?
S.PHON: kivadaqan nua va éaw ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "makuda sun
S.TRANSL: His wife asked him: ‚ÄúWhat‚Äôs the matter with you?

S.FORM: aku ini sun a taqed?
S.PHON: aku ini sun a taq…ôd
S.FORM: aku ini sun a taqed?
S.PHON: aku ini sun a taq…ôd
S.TRANSL: Why don‚Äôt you sleep?

S.FORM: aku qaritjqitjqitj sun?"
S.PHON: aku qaricqicqic sun"
S.FORM: aku qaritjqitjqitj sun?"
S.PHON: aku qaRi ¶qi ¶qi ¶ sun"
S.TRANSL: Why do you grind your teeth?‚Äù

S.FORM: "maitazuangata nu keman aken tua va…´etjuk," aya ti sa Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan.
S.PHON: "maitazua≈ãata nu k…ôman ak…ôn tua va é…ôcuk," aja ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.FORM: "maitazuangata nu keman aken tua valjetjuk," aya ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: "maitazua≈ãata nu k…ôman ak…ôn tua va é…ô ¶uk," aja ti sa pu éa éuja éujan.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúIt‚Äôs always just like that when I eat oranges,‚Äù he said.

S.FORM: manu pentjupetjuq tua qeluz nua tapaw.
S.PHON: manu p…ôncup…ôcuq tua q…ô…≠uz nua tapaw.
S.FORM: manu pentjupetjuq tua qeluz nua tapaw.
S.PHON: manu p…ôn ¶up…ô ¶uq tua q…ô…£uz nua tapaw.
S.TRANSL: In fact he was pulling out the pillar of the house.

S.FORM: qau sa pasusu-i tua na…´emau…´aw a djara…´ap a tapaw.
S.PHON: qau sa pasusu-i tua na é…ômau éaw a …âara éap a tapaw.
S.FORM: qau sa pasusu-i tua naljemauljaw a djaraljap a tapaw.
S.PHON: qau sa pasusu-i tua na é…ômau éaw a …âaRa éap a tapaw.
S.TRANSL: And he caused the whole house to follow the line of the stretched out banyan tree.

S.FORM: qau ma…´ianga patseged anga tiamadju a mapu…´at.
S.PHON: qau ma éia≈ãa pa ¶…ôg…ôd a≈ãa tiama…âu a mapu éat.
S.FORM: qau maljianga paceged anga tiamadju a mapuljat.
S.PHON: qau ma éia≈ãa pa ¶…ôg…ôd a≈ãa tiama…âu a mapu éat.
S.TRANSL: Next day they all woke up.

S.FORM: mintu i …´avi…´aving anga tua …´avek.
S.PHON: mintu i éavi éavi≈ã a≈ãa tua éav…ôk.
S.FORM: mintu i ljaviljaving anga tua ljavek.
S.PHON: mintu i éavi éavi≈ã a≈ãa tua éav…ôk.
S.TRANSL: And there they were on the edge of the sea.

S.FORM: qau mingtjus anga azua va…´aw.
S.PHON: qau mi≈ãcus a≈ãa azua va éaw.
S.FORM: qau mingtjus anga azua valjaw.
S.PHON: qau mi≈ã ¶us a≈ãa azua va éaw.
S.TRANSL: His wife was startled.

S.FORM: "aku imazanga ken?" aya ki…´avaran.
S.PHON: "aku imaza≈ãa k…ôn" aja ki éavaran.
S.FORM: "aku imazanga ken?" aya kiljavaran.
S.PHON: "aku imaza≈ãa k…ôn" aja ki éavaRan.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWhy am I here now?‚Äù she said.

S.FORM: qau ki…´avaran ti sa Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan: "tiaken a nakematsu a pasa maza.
S.PHON: qau ki éavaran ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "tiak…ôn a nak…ôma ¶u a pasa maza.
S.FORM: qau kiljavaran ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan: "tiaken a nakemacu a pasa maza.
S.PHON: qau ki éavaRan ti sa pu éa éuja éujan: "tiak…ôn a nak…ôma ¶u a pasa maza.
S.TRANSL: Pu…´a…´uya…´uyan said: ‚ÄúIt was I who brought you here.

S.FORM: ini anga nakuya aken.
S.PHON: ini a≈ãa nakuja ak…ôn.
S.FORM: ini anga nakuya aken.
S.PHON: ini a≈ãa nakuja ak…ôn.
S.TRANSL: I‚Äôm not bad any more.

S.FORM: mayanga mavilad.
S.PHON: maja≈ãa mavi…≠ad.
S.FORM: mayanga mavilad.
S.PHON: maja≈ãa mavi…£ad.
S.TRANSL: Don‚Äôt run away.

S.FORM: a pareka nanguanguaqi anga itjen mapu…´at."
S.PHON: a par…ôka na≈ãua≈ãuaqi a≈ãa ic…ôn mapu éat."
S.FORM: a pareka nanguanguaqi anga itjen mapuljat."
S.PHON: a paR…ôka na≈ãua≈ãuaqi a≈ãa i ¶…ôn mapu éat."
S.TRANSL: Let‚Äôs all be good to one another.‚Äù
